sharedBaseline.description: Both panels begin from the same tabular-data baseline and the same native web and code surface.
data: canonical bundled fixture used as the upload surrogate in tests
truthConstraints: No live ERP or warehouse connection is implied unless explicitly configured.
Shared baseline access is the same for both panels.
Web findings must stay distinct from dataset findings.

leftAgent.name: Ungrounded / Raw Agent
constraints: No explicit answer-evaluation pass before final response

rightAgent.name: Grounded Annona Agent
outputContract: situation_impact_action structure when a decision is required
no dashboard sprawl or black-box claims

stages.label: Dataset intake and profiling
stages.outcome: Identify available tables, fields, row counts, and basic data quality signals.

stages.label: Semantic understanding
stages.outcome: Infer operational meaning such as orders, lanes, timing, cost, reliability, margin, and action surfaces.

stages.label: Stable analysis primitives
stages.outcome: Prefer reusable primitives like variance, ranking, thresholding, trend framing, and recommendation synthesis over ad hoc tool invention.

stages.label: Orchestration and planning
stages.outcome: Select the right sequence of inspection, calculation, and contextualization steps for the prompt.

stages.label: Answer evaluation
stages.outcome: Check whether the recommendation is supported, scoped, and operationally usable before finalizing it.

openai.notes: Web search, file workflows, and code execution can be part of the shared baseline when OpenAI native tooling is configured.

anthropic.notes: Fall back to honest disclosure until equivalent native tooling is wired.
